name: Shiore Orochimaru
description: Originally a genin from the Hidden Grass Village attending the Chuunin Exams, Shiore was killed by Orochimaru shortly before the exams began. Orochimaru then took over Shiore's body and used it as a disguise in order to infiltrate the Chuunin Exams and scout out the potential of Uchiha Sasuke as a future vessel.

skills.name: Five Elements Seal
skills.description: Shiore seals one enemy, dealing 10 affliction damage to them for 3 turns. During this time, that enemy will deal 10 less non-affliction damage and their harmful skills will cost 1 additional random chakra.

skills.name: Giant Snake Bind
skills.description: Shiore summons a giant snake and binds one enemy, dealing 20 damage to them for 2 turns. The first turn, that enemy will be stunned for 1 turn.

skills.name: Curse Seal
skills.description: Shiore places a curse seal on an enemy, stealing 5 health from them for 3 turns. While active, that enemy will be unable to become invulnerable*. During this time, if that enemy is killed, Shiore gains 1 random chakra*.

skills.name: Snake Body Replacement
skills.description: This skill makes Shiore Orochimaru invulnerable for 1 turn.
